epigraph.quote: Nottingham used to be called Snottingham. The Snots.

per_stop.quote: We cycled 3 miles up to the Trent River, disused, often embanked railway line thru fields.
We drove to Nottingham + had lunch in a pub next to the Kanal. Good, Selaft!
The farm is a sort of depot for storing large lorries. Windswept.
